title: We just shipped Optionomics on iPhone — real-time options flow, AI trade ideas, and push alerts
author: OptionomicsAI
selftext:
Hey r/ai_trading, we’ve released Optionomics for iPhone https://apps.apple.com/us/app/optionomics/id6755105123.

We built it for people who already follow unusual options activity and want the same kind of workflow on mobile: fast scans, fewer taps, and notifications that actually reach you away from the desk.

What’s in v1

* Terminal — live unusual options flow with filters (premium, DTE, sentiment, etc.) so you can cut through noise instead of scrolling forever.
* Trade Ideas — AI-assisted trade ideas (gated by plan — Theta/Vega on our side).
* Live — live market commentary stream (same plan gating).
* Alerts — custom criteria + push notifications on iPhone.
* Overview — market pulse–style stats (put/call, top symbols, whale-style activity, etc.).

Why we’re posting here

A lot of you care about signal vs. hype and how “AI” is actually wired into a product. We’d love blunt feedback: what’s missing on mobile, what feels noisy, and what would make this worth keeping on your home screen next to your broker.

Housekeeping

* Subscription required for full access — details on [optionomics.ai](https://optionomics.ai/). 
* Plans are cheaper if subscribed through our portal.
* Not financial advice — options are risky; this is data and tooling for your own process.

If you try it, tell us one thing you’d fix first and one feature you’d add — we’ll read every comment.

comments.author: mountaineer6662
comments.body: Mobile app is very fast and helpful when I am on the go. I like the AI Trade Ideas.

comments.author: raikorish
comments.body:
i am using this a its a real time option flow alert help you to execute your trade from anywhere or anytime for smart money. 
I was happy yesterday that trade idea alert exactly catched the tesla trands and able to trade with happy ending.

comments.author: lptg13
comments.body: for the API access, is there an option for raw data for GEX to be calculated on the users side alongside your proprietary calcs for GEX? same with DEX etc...

replies.author: OptionomicsAI
replies.body: Yes, we provide access to the full options chain data. You can access it through the API to perform your calculations.

replies.author: lptg13
replies.body: hey folks, im doing a trial. the live terminal chart is buggy. its not often real time, usually 1-5 mins of delay on the candle. any chance this could be fixed? im trying to use QQQ/SPY flow to guide my futures trading (dealer hedging etc), but its tough when the candle prints arent aligned....

replies.author: OptionomicsAI
replies.body: Hello, thanks for doing the trial. Of course, we can look into the issue. Do you have a timeframe for when the issue was happening? We are also checking it.

replies.author: OptionomicsAI
replies.body:
Hello u/lptg13,

After working with our data provider, we believe the issue has now been resolved. Thank you for reporting it.

replies.author: lptg13
replies.body:
Thank you. Tried it today. The update speed is much better. Just something to point out though, the canvas rendering looks like it has a bug. Every 1-5 seconds when data is fetched the screen flickers... Just some constructive feedback. 

Any plans to have the API plot GEX for futures derivatives in the future?

replies.author: OptionomicsAI
replies.body:
Hello,

Thank you for confirming the improvement in speed. We will look into the other issue as well.

At this time, we do not have plans to support futures.

As a thank you, please accept our coupon code: THANKS10.

Thanks!
